_README: GISTARU RDTR activity-code → name dictionary (Indonesian KBLI-aligned codes). Empty until populated. To populate: open https://gistaru.atrbpn.go.id/rdtrinteraktif/, click any RDTR-covered point in Bali, open DevTools console, run `copy(JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries($nuxt.$store.state.map.ActivitiesData.filter(x=>x.id_kegiatan&&x.id_kegiatan!==-1).map(x=>[String(x.id_kegiatan).padStart(3,'0'),x.kegiatan]))))`, paste contents into this file replacing the placeholder. Re-run with `python3 scripts/sync_villa_land_profile.py --force` to refill use-case markers.
